text.fullText: As a carrier this regulation must pass. The brokers are manipulating the market and driving working class Americans into the ground. They are constantly short paying truckers and lying about compensation. There is no other legal form of extortion more egregious than the broker refusing to pay after we have delivered the freight.  I have countless examples of brokers not paying us with the excuse that 'the customer didn't pay so we cannot' or 'i didn't may any money on the load'.  Transparency is A MUST.  We are the ones who are actually paying the diesel, truck bills, insurance, labor, everything!
